summary: Phase D P0 (Inline Notes + Board Reorder) and Phase D P1 (Advanced Search Filters) fully tested. All features working correctly end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: Clear All button (data-testid=clear-filters-btn) lives INSIDE the filters panel (filtersOpen guard) — testers must open the panel before clicking Clear All. Minor UX note: could be exposed outside the panel too.

success_rate.backend: 100% (7 passed, 1 skipped — reorder skipped: only 1 saved player, needs ≥2)

seed_data_creation: Note 'Test note from Phase D testing' added to Daniel Orodje's board card (persists in DB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase D P0+P1 all verified. Nationality filter returns players with 'British' nationality (2 results). Commitment filter works for both committed/uncommitted. URL persistence on reload works. Filter chips dismissable. Clear All inside filter panel. Board inline notes: add/save/persist all working. Drag handles visible on board cards. Board reorder endpoint at /api/coach/board/reorder (PATCH) not fully tested as only 1 saved player.
